small.name: Anacostia Metro Station
small.notes: Single-platform Metro station; bus transfer area; mezzanine fare collection

medium.name: Denver Union Station
medium.notes: Historic renovation; bus concourse; light rail; Amtrak; retail; hotel above

large.name: Moynihan Train Hall
large.notes: SOM design; Amtrak/LIRR; 92 ft skylit atrium; 17 platforms; retail; concourse

space_library.name: Main Concourse / Great Hall
notes: Primary circulation and wayfinding; departure/arrival boards; high ceilings 30-80 ft; durable finishes for heavy foot traffic; 15-20 SF per peak-hour passenger

space_library.name: Ticketing / Customer Service
notes: Ticket vending machines; staffed service counter; queue management; ADA counter height; info displays

space_library.name: Fare Control / Turnstile Array
notes: Fare gates; wide ADA gate; peak throughput 25-30 pax/min per lane; emergency bypass; staff booth

space_library.name: Waiting Area / Passenger Lounge
notes: 12-15 SF/seated passenger; charging outlets; WiFi; info displays; accessible seating; climate-controlled

space_library.name: Platform / Boarding Area
notes: Platform edge warning; tactile strips; canopy/shelter; PA system; CCTV; platform screen doors for grade-separated; min 10 ft width; gap filler

space_library.name: Bus Berths / Sawtooth Bays
notes: 12 ft lane; 65 ft berth length for 40 ft bus; sawtooth angle 30-45 deg; passenger shelters; real-time info; separate from pedestrian paths

space_library.name: Escalators / Elevators / Stairs
notes: 3-4 escalators per platform access point; ADA elevator min; 32 in wide min stair; peak capacity sizing; backup power for elevators

space_library.name: Retail / Food Concessions
notes: Grab-and-go dominant; news/convenience; food service with grease trap; revenue generator; passenger dwell time opportunity

space_library.name: Public Restrooms
notes: High-volume fixtures; auto-flush; family restroom; anti-vandal; cleaning schedule posted; attendant booth for major stations

space_library.name: Driver / Crew Break Room
notes: Lockers; kitchenette; restrooms; dispatcher window; direct platform/berth access; shift change area

space_library.name: Dispatch / Operations Control
notes: SCADA/BAS monitoring; radio communications; real-time vehicle tracking; backup power; sightline to platforms/berths preferred

space_library.name: Transit Police / Security Office
notes: CCTV monitoring; holding area; lost and found; sightline to concourse; first responder coordination

space_library.name: Administrative Offices
notes: Station manager; transit authority staff; conference room; accessible from but separate from public areas

space_library.name: Bicycle Storage / Bike Share
notes: Secure bike cages; bike share dock; repair station; near station entry; 6 SF per bike; card-access for secure parking

space_library.name: Kiss-and-Ride / Rideshare Zone
notes: Short-term passenger drop-off/pick-up; rideshare staging; ADA loading zone; covered waiting; separate from bus operations

space_library.name: Main Mechanical
notes: Tunnel ventilation fans for underground; emergency smoke extraction; fire suppression; sump pumps

space_library.name: Electrical / Traction Power
notes: Traction power substation for rail; emergency generator; UPS for fare equipment and communications; signal equipment room

plan_archetypes.notes: Bar along platform; hall-and-wing for terminal with concourse
